case_title: RICHARD MARKS VS. DEAN L. DUNCAN DDS

docket_entries.description: CORRESPONDENCE RECEIVED BY DEFENDANT DUNCAN DDS, DEAN L. (& DOING BUSINESS AS DEAN L. DUNCAN DDS, INC.)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-08-2015 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JUN-12-2015 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. "DEFENDANT'S CHALLENGE TO VENUE IS DENIED", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARKS, RICHARD IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DUNCAN DDS, DEAN L. (& DOING BUSINESS AS DEAN L. DUNCAN DDS, INC.) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 40.00 - SERVED MAR-17-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DUNCAN DDS, DEAN L. (& DOING BUSINESS AS DEAN L. DUNCAN DDS, INC.)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-12-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-12-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
